title: R&F Princess Cove
subtitle: Waterfront living · Near Johor-Singapore Causeway
intro: R&F Princess Cove is a flagship waterfront development in Tanjung Puteri, Johor Bahru, minutes from the Causeway. This profile covers public facts for owners and buyers researching CIQ-area property.

propertyTypes.name: 1-Bedroom
